category_title: Low-proficiency international students with high linguistic anxiety and reliance on external support
minimal_context: The student is in class writing a 300-word blog reflection on their Personal Narrative assignment.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time to write your 300-word blog reflection on the Personal Narrative assignment.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: When I write my essay, I meet many problems. I cannot remember many words and I do not know how to write so much words.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just try to write what you can.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: This is my first year come to United States, so my English is not very good. I look up the words in the dictionary, ask my roommate about my grammar.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's look at what you have on the page right now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I felt not good, I tried my best to write it but it was so bad. I am so unhappy. I will just come back home to rewrite my essay.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time to write your 300-word blog reflection on the Personal Narrative assignment.

STUDENT: When I write my essay, I meet many problems. I cannot remember many words and I do not know how to write so much words.

TUTOR: Just try to write what you can.

STUDENT: This is my first year come to United States, so my English is not very good. I look up the words in the dictionary, ask my roommate about my grammar.

TUTOR: Let's look at what you have on the page right now.

STUDENT: I felt not good, I tried my best to write it but it was so bad. I am so unhappy. I will just come back home to rewrite my essay.

task.content: Writing a 300+ word blog reflection on the Personal Narrative assignment

context.social_setting: working independently but asking roommate for help
context.time_context: separate day, typically the day after their final submission

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When I write my essay, I meet many problems
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: look up the words in the dictionary, ask my roommate about my grammar; came back home to rewrite my essay
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: grammar is not very good, I cannot remember many words and I do not know how to write so much words; felt not good, tried my best to write it but it was so bad; was so unhappy
related_quotes: When I write my essay, I meet many problems. Such as my grammar is not very good, I cannot remember many words and I do not know how to write so much words.

behavior_patterns.condition: When I write my essay, I meet many problems
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: look up the words in the dictionary, ask my roommate about my grammar
behavior_patterns.internal_state: grammar is not very good, I cannot remember many words
related_quotes: I look up the words in the dictionary, ask my roommate about my grammar. I try my best to write the essay better.

behavior_patterns.condition: When feeling the essay was so bad
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: came back home to rewrite my essay
behavior_patterns.internal_state: felt not good; was so unhappy
related_quotes: I felt not good, I tried my best to write it but it was so bad. Although I was so unhappy, I knew it was my problem.
